claim: The Bitcoin block hash at height 957110, read big-endian as an integer, is even (least-significant bit == 0).

inputs.source: canonical Bitcoin block at the stated height; block hash from any full node or public explorer, e.g. https://mempool.space/api/block-height/957110

resolution_function.verdict: PASS(100) if predicate true else FAIL(0)

committed_before.note: committed while target height was unmined; outcome not yet knowable
